## 📋 PR Type
<!-- Check one or more -->
- [ ] 🆕 New Skill
- [ ] ✨ Skill Update
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Repository Maintenance

## 🎯 Summary
<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## 📁 Files Changed
<!-- List the skill(s) or files modified -->

## ✅ Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are completed -->

### For New Skills
- [ ] Skill has minimum 100 lines
- [ ] Contains proper frontmatter (name, description, version, tags)
- [ ] Includes practical code examples
- [ ] Follows existing skill structure
- [ ] README.md updated with skill link
- [ ] No duplicate content with existing skills

### For Skill Updates
- [ ] Changes improve clarity or add value
- [ ] Code examples are tested/verified
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing patterns
- [ ] Version number incremented if applicable

### General
- [ ] No typos or grammatical errors
- [ ] Markdown formatting is correct
- [ ] All links are valid
- [ ] Follows repository code of conduct

## 🧪 Testing
<!-- How was this tested? -->

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Visual proof of changes -->

## 📝 Additional Notes
<!-- Any other information -->
